_comment: Demo 1 — Y-is-Time. Skeleton for paradigm-revealing onboarding demo. Requires source.jpg (high-contrast still, 1920x1080) + audio.wav (10s instrumental w/ clear onset pattern, e.g., kick+snare or simple synth pulse). Curve points below are placeholder — replace with values sampled from real audio onset envelope after sourcing audio asset.
name: Y-is-Time
description: Each row of the frame is a moment in time. The audio's recent onset history is painted vertically.

lanes._comment: Points below are placeholder — sample from real audio onset envelope after sourcing audio. Curve must span [0,1] in t, mapping to perceptually-strong hue shifts. Try amplitude-followed peaks at every onset.

demoMetadata.label: Each row = a moment in time. The audio is painted vertically.
